hero.title: Khulega Online
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform and services.

intro.heading: 1. Introduction
intro.para1: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of:
intro.para2: All services, tools, integrations, and seller support provided by Khulega Online are covered under these Terms.
intro.notice: By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you must discontinue use of the platform.

sections.title: About Khulega Online
sections.intro: Khulega Online is a SaaS-enabled platform that allows sellers to:
list: Integrate and manage multiple online marketplaces
Manage listings, inventory, pricing, and orders
sections.infoBox: The Unified Seller Console (USC) is accessible via usc.khulega.online
sections.highlight: Khulega Online does not operate as a marketplace. It provides technology and service infrastructure to sellers.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.intro: To use Khulega Online services, you must:
list: Be at least 18 years of age
Operate a legally registered business (if applicable)
Provide accurate KYC and business information
Comply with applicable Indian laws and regulations
sections.alert: We reserve the right to approve or reject any registration.

sections.title: Account Registration & Responsibilities
list: You must provide true and accurate information
You are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality
You are responsible for all activities under your account
You must notify us immediately of unauthorized access
sections.alert: Khulega Online is not liable for losses arising from compromised credentials due to user negligence.

sections.title: Marketplace Integrations
sections.intro: Khulega Online enables integration with third-party marketplaces such as:
list: Sellers must comply with each marketplace's policies.
Khulega Online is not responsible for marketplace suspensions, penalties, or disputes.
Integration availability may change without prior notice.

sections.title: Use of the Unified Seller Console (USC)
list: Not to attempt hacking, scraping, or reverse engineering
Not to interfere with platform performance
Not to upload malicious code or harmful content
sections.alertDanger: Any violation may result in immediate suspension.

sections.title: Seller Responsibilities
sections.alert: Khulega Online does not assume liability for product-related claims.

sections.title: Fees & Payments
sections.intro: If you subscribe to paid plans or managed services:
list: Fees will be defined in a separate agreement or invoice
Payments must be made within agreed timelines
Non-payment may result in service suspension
Fees are non-refundable unless explicitly stated
sections.highlight: All taxes are the responsibility of the seller unless specified.

sections.title: Service Availability
sections.intro: We aim to provide uninterrupted service; however:
list: Third-party API failures may impact functionality
sections.highlight: Khulega Online does not guarantee 100% uptime.

sections.title: Termination & Suspension
sections.intro: We may suspend or terminate access if:

sections.title: Data & Privacy
sections.intro: Your data will be handled as per our Privacy Policy. Sellers consent to:
